{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"2","subject":"Clean up documentation and remove AI/agent traces","description":"Remove ALL files from /Users/ggomes/dev/indy-frontend/mobile-apps/ that are:

1. AI/agent-related documentation:
   - AGENTS.md
   - PLANNING.md
   - TASKS.md
   - WARP.md (symlink to CLAUDE.md)
   - PROMPT_TEMPLATE.md
   - DEV-MODE-SUMMARY.md
   - INJECTION_RESEARCH.md
   - SAFE_AREA_ATTEMPTS.md
   - TESTFLIGHT_ISSUES.md
   - TESTING-CHECKLIST.md
   - ACCESSIBE_FINDINGS.md
   - ACT_SETUP_INSTRUCTIONS.md
   - ANDROID_DEPLOYMENT_REPORT.md
   - ANDROID_FIXES_APPLIED.md
   - BROWSERSTACK_SETUP.md
   - IPA_DOWNLOAD_GUIDE.md
   - LIVE-DEV-GUIDE.md
   - DEPLOYMENT_CHECKLIST.md
   - README_IOS_FIREBASE.md
   - capacitor-migration-notes.md

2. Test files created during development:
   - tests/ directory
   - test-date-picker-complete.js
   - test-showtimes-navigation.js
   - test-cinepolis.sh
   - run-tests.sh
   - playwright.config.js
   - playwright-report/
   - test-results/
   - test-results-fixed.log
   - test-results.log

3. Debug/development scripts:
   - auto_debug.sh
   - debug_workflow.sh
   - create_fresh_cert.sh
   - reexport_cert.sh
   - generate_session.rb

4. Agent/tool configs:
   - .mcp.json
   - .claude/ directory
   - .playwright-mcp/
   - .idea/
   - logs/
   - screenshots/ (root level)

5. Misc unnecessary files:
   - navigate-to-showtimes.swift
   - sync-android.sh (only keep if genuinely useful)
   - android-app-signing/ directory
   - Any *.backup files in the tree (*.swift.backup, *.kt.backup)

6. Scripts that were made for testing with agents:
   - scripts/browserstack_test.py
   - scripts/browserstack_test.sh
   - scripts/fix-android-background-icons.sh
   - scripts/fix-android-icons.sh
   - scripts/fix_provisioning_profile.sh
   - scripts/manual_firebase_upload.sh
   - scripts/regenerate_certificates.sh
   - scripts/screenshot.sh (check if indy-mobileapps has it - if yes keep it, it's useful)
   - scripts/serve_ipa.py
   - scripts/verify_cert_setup.sh
   - scripts/bundle-instructions.txt

7. Docs directory - check if files are useful or AI-generated. The docs in indy-mobileapps/docs/ (APPSTORE_BUILD_SETUP.md, CERTIFICATE_SETUP.md, etc.) look like legitimate setup docs - keep those.

Also check for any remaining references to "Claude", "AI agent", "coding agent", "Warp" in any file and remove those references.

IMPORTANT: Do NOT remove CLAUDE.md yet - that will be rewritten separately.","assignedBy":"cleaner","timestamp":"2026-03-06T17:53:12.488Z"}
